name_cn:
Top-tier factory, full set
Light pink in stock!!️
Lady's latest micro series, too small to hold anything, can only hold a cute little bag😘, made of soft sheepskin, iconic letter hardware, exquisite shape👏🏻, simple, stylish and versatile, small capacity, can only hold lipstick and car keys, also works as a card holder🤗
size:12*10*5cm
